still_prompt: Mystical scene with softly flickering candles, tarot cards spread on dark velvet table, wisps of incense smoke, warm amber lighting, shallow depth of field, cinematic mood, dark and mysterious atmosphere
video_prompt: Slow cinematic movement, candle flames gently flickering, wisps of incense smoke drifting upward, subtle ambient light shifts, mystical atmosphere
notes: Still image is exceptional — candles, tarot cards, crystal balls, incense smoke, warm amber lighting. Veo 2.0 animated it in 33s producing a 1.6MB MP4 well under the 5MB web target. Video shows subtle flickering and smoke movement. The image-to-video pipeline (Imagen still + Veo animate) is viable for production hero backgrounds.
